item.title: Potential Employee Tries to Press Charges
item.description: A potential employee takes an unexpected turn—trying to press charges against us. What sparked this surprising move?

item.title: $15,000 Tesla Repair?!
item.description: A Tesla repair bill comes in at a shocking $15,000. What went wrong, and how can owners avoid such costly surprises?

item.title: Car Loan Amortization Explained
item.description: Ever feel like your car loan never shrinks? Discover how amortization works and why payments can feel stuck. What’s the hidden math behind your monthly bill?

media:content.media:description: Ever feel like your car loan never shrinks? Discover how amortization works and why payments can feel stuck. What’s the hidden math behind your monthly bill?

item.title: Car Lot Questions You Shouldn’t Answer
item.description: Dealers ask certain questions to gain the upper hand. What are the questions you should never answer if you want to protect your wallet and get the best deal?

media:content.media:title: Car Lot Questions You Shouldn’t Answer

item.title: Avoid Tickets Without Radar Detectors
item.description: Radar detectors aren’t the only way to stay ticket‑free. What smart driving habits and awareness tips can keep you safe and out of trouble on the road?

item.title: Beat Car Dealerships at Their Own Game
item.description: Dealerships have tricks up their sleeves—but you can outsmart them. What strategies help buyers take control and walk away with the best deal?

item.title: Theft Protection Scam Uncovered
item.description: Dealerships often push theft protection packages that don’t deliver. What’s the truth behind these costly add‑ons?

item.title: How to Get Hired at a Car Dealership
item.description: See what it takes to land a job at a car dealership. What skills and traits do managers look for in new hires?
